hooks.command: if echo "$CC_EDITED_FILE" | grep -q '\.py$'; then python3 -m py_compile "$CC_EDITED_FILE" 2>&1 || echo 'SYNTAX ERROR in edited file'; fi

cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // ""' 2>/dev/null); if echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'rsync' && echo "$cmd" | grep -q 'bridge:'; then ROOT=/mnt/c/PK/Projects/Bridge/bridge-v2; fail=""; (cd "$ROOT/wa-service" && npx jest --forceExit) 1>&2 || fail="$fail wa-service"; (cd "$ROOT/processor" && python3 -m pytest tests/ -q) 1>&2 || fail="$fail processor"; (cd "$ROOT/bot" && python3 -m pytest tests/ -q) 1>&2 || fail="$fail bot"; if [ -n "$fail" ]; then printf '{"continue":false,"stopReason":"Tests FAILED in:%s — fix before deploying."}' "$fail"; exit 2; fi; fi
